evals.prompt: I run a Shopify store and want to start SMS marketing. What should I know about compliance?
evals.expected_output: TCPA compliance guide for SMS marketing including consent, quiet hours, opt-out, and disclosures

assertions.name: tcpa_consent
assertions.description: Explains that express written consent is required specifically for SMS, separate from email consent

assertions.name: quiet_hours
assertions.description: Covers quiet hours requirement — no messages before 8 AM or after 9 PM local time

assertions.name: opt_out
assertions.description: Explains STOP keyword handling and requirement to honor opt-outs immediately

evals.prompt: How often should I send SMS campaigns to my customers? I have 5,000 SMS subscribers for my DTC beauty brand.
evals.expected_output: Frequency guidelines for SMS marketing with specific recommendations

assertions.name: frequency_range
assertions.description: Recommends 4-8 SMS per month maximum for most brands

assertions.name: segmentation
assertions.description: Suggests segmenting frequency by engagement level — VIP/engaged get more, casual subscribers get less

assertions.name: campaign_types
assertions.description: Distinguishes between promotional SMS (limited frequency) and transactional SMS (no limit)

evals.prompt: Should I use Klaviyo SMS or add a dedicated SMS tool like Attentive? We already use Klaviyo for email.
evals.expected_output: Comparison of integrated vs dedicated SMS platforms with recommendation

assertions.name: integration_advantage
assertions.description: Explains the advantage of Klaviyo SMS being integrated with existing email (shared segments, unified analytics)

assertions.name: dedicated_advantage
assertions.description: Explains when a dedicated SMS platform like Attentive makes sense (SMS as primary revenue channel, advanced conversational features)

assertions.name: recommendation
assertions.description: Provides a clear recommendation with criteria for when to reconsider
